title: mollugo quadrangularis
intro: Mollugo quadrangularis, also known as Indian chickweed or quadrangular carpetweed, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the family Molluginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including wound healing, skin protection, and anti-arthritic effects, making it a valuable remedy for skin and joint issues. Mollugo quadrangularis can be prepared into herbal preparations such as tea, powder, or oil, and is often used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various ailments.
